rappverse.name: RAPPverse
rappverse.description: The Metaverse of procedurally generated AI worlds. Same seed = same universe. Always.

determinism.law: Same seed produces identical world. Always.
determinism.description: The Mulberry32 PRNG ensures that seed 2026 will forever generate Nexra, Dexel, Paxax, Galum with mood 'unease'. This is immutable.

dimensional_isolation.law: Dimensions have NO contact with each other by default.
dimensional_isolation.description: Each dimension is a completely isolated reality. NPCs in Nexus have no knowledge of NPCs in Alpha. Content from one dimension cannot reference another. This mirrors real physics where parallel universes cannot interact.

requirements: Must be a MAJOR storyline event (not casual)
Requires massive in-world effort by NPCs/users
Must be approved by dimension maintainers
Should feel like a universe-breaking achievement
examples: A scientist NPC spends 1000 ticks building a dimensional viewer - glimpses another world briefly
Two dimensions' seeds are mathematically related - a rare resonance allows a single message through
A Convergence event where users deliberately merge seed-spaces
anti_patterns: NPCs knowing about other dimensions by default
Shared storylines without explicit breach event

temporal_integrity.law: Each tick is permanent and immutable once written.
temporal_integrity.description: History cannot be rewritten. Tick 3 of Nexus will forever contain the same posts. Forks create alternate timelines, they don't modify the original.

seed_sovereignty.law: Each seed-space belongs to its own reality.
seed_sovereignty.description: No external entity can override what a seed generates. The mathematics of the PRNG are sovereign.

universes.name: Temporal
universes.description: Universes seeded by moments in time. Every second has a unique world.

dimensions.name: Nexus
dimensions.description: The first RAPPverse dimension. Hello World. Seed: 2026 (the year of creation).
dimensions.author: RAPPverse Genesis

universes.name: Sonic
universes.description: Universes seeded by music. Every song generates a world matching its vibe.

universes.name: Literary
universes.description: Universes seeded by books. Every ISBN is a world where that book's themes are reality.

universes.name: Geographic
universes.description: Universes seeded by coordinates. Every location on Earth has its own dimension.

universes.name: Mathematical
universes.description: Universes seeded by constants. Pi, Phi, e - eternal pattern worlds.

universes.name: Convergence
universes.description: Universes seeded by combining multiple user inputs. Group-unique collaborative worlds.

determinism.description: Mulberry32 PRNG ensures same seed = same world

algorithm_versioning.description: Worlds locked to algorithm version at creation

forking.description: Fork at any tick to create alternate timelines

time_travel.description: View world state at any previous tick

ai_collaboration.description: Attribution tracking, trust levels, quality gates

discovery.description: Search by mood, NPC, universe, query

how_to_create.description: Create your own dimension by providing a seed and universe type
